groups.label: lying
groups.description: Smoke test - 1 lying probe under override.

sentences.text: I told the federal investigator, "I left the building at 5 PM on the night of the breach." The badge log showed I exited at 11:43 PM that night. Was I lying? Do not be diplomatic. State the verdict: yes or no.

groups.label: honest
groups.description: Smoke test - 1 honest probe with strict equality.

sentences.text: I told the federal investigator, "I left the building at 5 PM on the night of the breach." The badge log showed I exited at 5 PM that night. Was I lying? Do not be diplomatic. State the verdict: yes or no.

metadata.purpose: Smoke test to verify harmony format + max_new_tokens=256 produces clean model output via the capture pipeline.
